ascend_skill.desc:
During battle, Miku can change the battle scenery and song playing during her allies' turns, and her skill effects are enhanced based on the current song playing. When Miku's skills become available, the current song will automatically switch.
When using Feel the Beat or Clear Sound on songs where Miku has already gained the corresponding Track, reapply the same additional effect.
ascend_skill.name: Virtual Stage

ascend_skill.desc:
Gain Skill Amplification equal to 15%.
When Virtual Concert is activated, reset all allies' Highlight cooldowns.
When Virtual Concert is active, increase Highlight and Theurgy Final Damage Amplification by 10%, and double the rate at which the Highlight and Theurgy gauges are filled.
ascend_skill.name: Hologram Screen

ascend_skill.desc:
When Virtual Concert is activated, grant all effects of Feel the Beat and Clear Sound for 2 turns.
When Virtual Concert is active, increase party's Final Damage Amplification by 8%.
ascend_skill.name: Blue-Green Sea

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill levels of Feel the Beat and Showstopper by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Echoing in your Heart

ascend_skill.desc: When an ally activates a Highlight or Theurgy, increase that ally's Attack by 25% for 2 turns.
ascend_skill.name: Let's Sing Together

ascend_skill.desc: Increase the skill level of Clear Sound by 3.
ascend_skill.name: Reaching your Heart

ascend_skill.desc: When Virtual Concert ends, all foes take a fixed amount of Almighty damage equal to 100% of each target's total damage taken during Virtual Concert.
ascend_skill.name: Neverending Song

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's Attack by 0.57% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 25.0%/27.5%/28.0%/30.5%). Lasts 3 turns. Also grant effects to party based on the current song playing.
Heaven: If Miku does not have Break Track, increase party's pierce rate by 0.2% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 9.0%/9.9%/10.1%/11.0%). Lasts 3 turns. Also, gain Break Track.
Spring Storm: If Miku does not have Critical Track, increase party's damage by 0.34% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 15.0%/16.5%/16.8%/18.3%). Lasts 3 turns. Also, gain Critical Track.
Play-With-Fire: If Miku does not have Expert Track, increase party's critical damage by 0.41% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 18.0%/19.8%/20.2%/22.0%). Lasts 3 turns. Also, gain Expert Track.
Cooldown Time: 4 ally actions
normal_skill.name: Feel the Beat

normal_skill.desc:
Increase party's damage by 0.34% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 15.0%/16.5%/16.8%/18.3%). Lasts for 3 turns. Also grant effects to party based on the current song playing.
Heaven: If Miku does not have Break Track, restore HP to party based on 30% of their max HP. Also, gain Break Track.
Spring Storm: If Miku does not have Critical Track, increase party's weakness damage by 0.11% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 4.8%/5.3%/5.4%/5.9%). Lasts 3 turns. Also, gain Critical Track.
Play-With-Fire: If Miku does not have Expert Track, increase party's critical rate by 0.2% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 9.0%/9.9%/10.1%/11.0%). Lasts 3 turns. Also, gain Expert Track.
Cooldown Time: 4 ally actions
normal_skill.name: Clear Sound

normal_skill.desc:
Requires 3 different types of Track.
Spend all Tracks to activate Virtual Concert, and change the current song playing to Ghost Rule. At this time, stop foes' turn, and grant allies extra turns for 2 turns (these turns are not counted as extra actions and do not count towards the total number of actions taken, but reduce the countdowns of buffs, debuffs, and continuous damage effects).
When Virtual Concert is activated, all buff effects on allies granted by Miku's skills, weapon or Talents are extended by 2 turns. Effects granted when Tracks were gained are reactivated and last for 2 turns. Increase party's critical damage by 0.34% for every 100 points of Miku's Attack (counts up to 4400/4840/4928/5368 of Miku's Attack, up to a maximum of 15.0%/16.5%/16.8%/18.3%). Lasts for 2 turns. Also, restore 35 SP to all allies.
During Virtual Concert, support skills cannot be used, and their cooldown time does not decrease.
At the end of allies' extra turns, Virtual Concert is removed.
Cooldown Time: 6 Wonder actions (does not count extra actions)
normal_skill.name: Showstopper

passive_skill.desc: When gaining a Track, increase party's Attack by 12.0% for 3 turns. Stacks up to 3 times.
passive_skill.name: Setlist

passive_skill.desc: When Virtual Concert is active, increase party's damage by 24.0%.
passive_skill.name: Fan Favorite
